_description: Registry mapping RCM knowledge libraries to their canonical Confluence pages. Update when libraries are created or versioned in Confluence.

human-truths.title: RCM Knowledge Library — Human Truths
human-truths.description: Universal human cognitive and behavioral patterns that transcend domain

audience-intelligence.title: RCM Knowledge Library — Audience Intelligence
audience-intelligence.description: Audience segmentation, motivation modeling, and decision psychology

objections.title: RCM Knowledge Library — Objections
objections.description: Common objections, resistance patterns, and rebuttal frameworks

visual-cognition.title: RCM Knowledge Library — Visual Cognition
visual-cognition.description: How humans process visual information — hierarchy, attention, composition

media-hierarchy.title: RCM Knowledge Library — Media Hierarchy
media-hierarchy.description: Media format effectiveness ranking by context, audience, and objective

media-composition.title: RCM Knowledge Library — Media Composition
media-composition.description: Compositional principles for each media format in the hierarchy

ui-ux.title: RCM Knowledge Library — UI/UX
ui-ux.description: Interface design principles, patterns, and usability heuristics

marketing-view.title: RCM Knowledge Library — Marketing View
marketing-view.description: Marketing strategy frameworks, channel dynamics, and campaign architecture

venture.description: Venture planning, business model design, GTM strategy, fundraising, governance

product.description: Product development, UX research, roadmapping, feature prioritization

marketing.description: Campaign strategy, audience targeting, channel planning, creative briefs
